content:
🌟 openserp | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing a self-hosted, multi-engine Search Engine Results Page (SERP) API for AI, LLM, RAG, and SEO automation tasks, especially for non-Google search engine coverage.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-engine support (Google, Yandex, Baidu, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Ecosia) • Megasearch across multiple engines • URL extraction with content parsing (Markdown, Text) • SERP features (AI summaries, answer boxes, etc.) • Image search
📖 Summary: OpenSERP is an open-source, self-hostable API and CLI that provides live search data from multiple search engines like Google, Yandex, and Bing. It's designed for AI, SEO, and automation workflows, offering features like URL extraction, SERP feature parsing, and various data output formats.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
